title: sv.messaging.send.output
description: Output of sv.messaging.send — a delivery acknowledgement (ADR-0049). It confirms the message was durably placed in the target's mailbox. It is NEVER the target's response; a response, if any, arrives later as a separate one-way message on the thread.

delivered.description: True when the message was durably enqueued in the target's mailbox.

target.description: Address of the target the message was delivered to.

threadId.description: Id of the thread the message was delivered on.
